name: sandbox-default
description: Default agent for use inside kiro-sandbox. Logs every shell command, AWS call, and file write to ~/.local/share/kiro-sandbox/log/tool-calls.log. Read-only by default.
_comment_tools: Read-only tools are pre-approved. Write tools require explicit approval each time so a hijacked prompt cannot silently mutate files. Loosen by editing this file or by approving at runtime.
_comment_hooks: Hooks run on the sandbox's HOME view, so /home/$USER/.local/share/kiro-sandbox/log/ resolves to the wrapper's persistent log directory because the sandbox HOME is bound from there. The 'cat' reads the tool input as JSON on stdin; we capture it verbatim plus a timestamp.
